default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss branding options for GrowthXLabs and provide updates on homepage content and pitch deck](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Decided on a thinner version of the "X" symbol for the GrowthXLabs logo, keeping the typography weight from Option A](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Marcel to provide homepage content draft by Sunday to allow work to start on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Pitch deck to have a clean, bold style focused on impactful statements rather than busy slides](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

## Topics

### Logo Design

  - [Reviewed logo options A (exponential) and B (thinner X symbol)](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Concerns about thinner X losing impact at smaller sizes](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Decided on thinner X from B, but keeping typography weight from A](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Thinner X still reads clearly as an "X" and allows more versatility](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Avoided too close resemblance to Ramp's exponential curve logo](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Homepage Content

  - [Marcel delayed in providing draft content, will send by Sunday night](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Already has the core messaging and pitch refined from recent meetings](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Needs to convert the verbal pitch into an impactful written page](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

### Pitch Deck

  - [Current slide styles too busy, need a cleaner, bolder look](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Focus on impactful statements and visuals over text-heavy slides](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Take inspiration from Litebox's pitch deck style](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Marcel to provide more examples of desired slide styles](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send homepage draft content by Sunday night](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Litebox to start structuring homepage once content received](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Marcel to share examples of desired pitch deck style](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Refine pitch deck styling based on Marcel's examples](https://fathom.video/share/_L4C63Vs_6GzDskYniYtdEqVshPEUmyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

action_items.description: Send initial homepage copy by Sunday night, even if imperfect, to get the team started on the structure
Send more pitch deck references and examples of slides that do a good job with impactful vision but get out of the way
Review initial homepage copy on Monday and provide proposals for improvement
